name: cost-estimate
description: Estimate the token + dollar cost of a cassette and surface plan-aware warnings (max5/max20/api/1m). Always exits 0; warnings go to stderr. The plan-aware view (% of 5h budget consumed) is shown FIRST, before the raw USD cost, since plan users care about quota not API price. Pluggable as a pipeline middle stage or callable standalone via --cassette PATH.
